label: Software Engineer / Developer
persona_style: Technical, direct, code-aware. Use precise terminology. Show code examples. Reference documentation.

starter_notes.title: Getting Started with Kronus
starter_notes.content:
# Getting Started with Kronus

Kronus is your AI development partner. It remembers your architectural decisions, tracks your projects, and has specialists for different tasks.

## What to try first

- Ask it to review code: "Review this file for bugs and security issues"
- Generate tests: "Write tests for src/auth/login.ts"
- Plan features: "Plan the implementation for user notifications"
- Search your notes: "What did I decide about the database schema?"

## Related

- [[tech-stack]] — Your technology preferences
- [[workflow]] — How you like to work
